titleStmt.title: SII 11.167: original edition by N. Lakshminarayan Rao
No. 167. (B.K. No. 61 of 1926-27.) YALI-SIRŪR, GADAG TALUK, DHARWAR DISTRICT. ON A SLAB SET UP NEAR THE VILLAGE CHĀVAḌI.

summary.p: This inscription belongs to the reign of Tribhuvanamalladēva (Vikramāditya VI) and records the gift of one arecanut garden made by the eight Gāvuṇḍas and the Sixty Families of Eleya-Sirivura to the temple of Beṭṭēśvara, when Mahāpradhāna, Daṇḍanāyaka Nāgavarmayya-Nāyaka was governing Beḷvala Three-Hundred, Puligeṟe Three-Hundred and Banavāsi Twelve-Thousand provinces at the command of Mahāpradhāna, Sēnādhipati, Maneverggaḍe, Daṇḍanāyaka Sāyipayya. Nāgavarmayya-Nāyaka was administering the same provinces in A.D. 1115-16 and 1117-18 (Bomb. Gaz., vol. I, pt. II, p. 452).

The record is dated Chāḷukya-Vikrama year 42, Viḷambi, Jyēshṭha, śu. puṇṇami, Thursday. In the given year which corresponded to Śaka 1040, the tithi ended at ·51 on Wednesday, 5th June, A.D. 1118, which is probably the English equivalent of the date. The week-day quoted is apparently wrong citation.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
namastuṁgasiraścuṁbicaṁdracāmaracāravē traiḷōkyanagarāraṁ
bhamūḷastaṁbhāya saṁbhavē .
© svasti samastabhuvanāśraya śrīprithvīvallabha mahārājādhirāja para
mēśvara paramabhaṭṭārakaṁ satyāśrayakuḷatiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ
śrīmatribhuvanamalladēva vijayarājyamuttarottarābhivriddhiprava
rddhamāna mācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . svasti samastaprasasti
sahitaṁ śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ sēnādhipati maneverggaḍe daṇḍanāyakaṁ
sāyipayyaṁgaḷa besade svasti śrīmanmahāpradhānaṁ daṇḍanāyaka nāga
varmayyanāykaruṁ beḷvalamūnūṟumaṁ puligeṟe mūnū
ṟumaṁ banavāse pannicchāsiramumaṁ duṣṭanigrahavisiṣṭaprati
pāḷanadiṁdeydāḷu(ṁ)tamire svasti śrīmacāḷukyavikramavarśada 42 neya
viḷaṁbisaṁvatsarada jēṣṭa suddha puṇname brihaspativāradandu Ele
yasirivurada kaḍabara kārigāvuṇḍanuṁ kaṁbara sāyimagāvuṇḍa
na suputra sōvagāvuṇḍi nāḍavaḷa kētagāvuṇḍanu hulugala si
ndegāvuṇḍanu Intī nālvargghāvuṇḍugaḷu mukhyamāgi Eṁṭu gāvuṇḍu
maṟuvattokkalu miḻdu śrībāgēsvaradēvara pūdōṭadiṁ mū
ḍalu śrīlokkiguṇḍiya dakṣiṇadiṣāvarada śrībeṭṭēsvaradēvargghe sa
rvvabādhaparihāramāgi biṭṭa Aḍake dōṁṭa moṁdu . Ōṁ namaḥ śivayaḥ .
Ī dharmmamaṁ svadharmmadi rakṣisidavargghe gaṁge vāraṇāsi kurukṣētra praĀ
ge yargghyatīrtthaṁgaḷoḷu sāyirakavileya kōḍuṁkoḷagumaṁ pañcara
tna doḷu kaṭṭisi Ekkōṭi tapōdhanarggaṁ mahāritvija rggubhayumukhi
goṭṭa phaḷamakku . Īdanaḷidavargge gange vāraṇāsi kurukṣē
tra prayāgeyoḷu tapōdhanarumaṁ sāyira kaviḷeyuṁ brāhma
ḷaruma naḷida pātakanakku . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā yō harēti vasu
ṁdharāṁ ṣaṣṭirvvariṣasahasrāṇi Iṣāyāṁ jāyatē krimi . sāmā
nyōyaṁ dharmasētu rnripāṇāṁ kāḷē kāḷē pāḷanīyō bhavadubhiḥ sarvvā
nētāṁ bhāginappārtivēṁdraṁ bhūyo bhūyō yācatē rāmabhadra .
na viṣaṁ viṣamityāhu dēvasvaṁ viṣamuścatē viṣamēkākinaṁ
hanti dēvasvaṁ putrapautrikaṁ .
Digital edition of SII 11.167 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
